title: Improve Thala repository quality
description: Meta improvement session for Thala. Inspect the current codebase and Beads state, identify high-impact bounded improvements, implement conservative patches that preserve the ports-and-adapters architecture, validate with relevant Rust checks, and push completed work.
acceptance_criteria: At least one concrete repository quality improvement is implemented, relevant tests or checks pass, Beads state is updated, and changes are committed and pushed.
close_reason: Implemented validator infrastructure-failure hardening with regression tests and passed fmt, clippy, test, and release build.

acceptance_criteria: 1. Review HubSpot CRM core features (contact management, deal pipelines, activity tracking, email integration, reporting dashboards). 2. title: Enhance ChiroPro CRM functionality to align with full-featured CRMs like HubSpot
description: Submitted via Discord by <@1477336879765389374> in channel 1477706101746307145
acceptance_criteria:
- Contact management supports detailed profiles with activity history, notes, and communication logs
- Sales pipeline with customizable stages and drag-and-drop deal tracking is implemented
- Automated email sequences and follow-up reminders can be configured per contact or segment
- Contact segmentation and list filtering by custom properties is available
- Task and activity tracking (calls, emails, meetings) is linked to contact records
- Dashboard provides CRM analytics including conversion rates, pipeline value, and activity metrics
- Bulk actions (import, export, mass email, bulk property updates) are supported
- Integration points for email (send/receive tracking) are functional within the CRM
- Feature set is benchmarked against core HubSpot CRM free-tier capabilities with a gap analysis documented

metadata.stuck_reason: Stall timeout: no worker output within the configured window

title: Implement built-in CRM functionality in ChiroPro
description: Submitted via Discord by <@1477336879765389374> in channel 1477706101746307145
acceptance_criteria:
1. Users can create, view, edit, and delete contact/lead records within ChiroPro.
2. Users can track interactions and communication history with contacts (calls, emails, notes).
3. Users can create and manage deal/opportunity pipelines with customizable stages.
4. Users can segment and filter contacts by custom properties and tags.
5. Users can set tasks and follow-up reminders tied to contacts.
6. Users can view a dashboard with CRM metrics (new leads, pipeline value, conversion rates).
7. CRM features replace core HubSpot functionality so users no longer need a separate HubSpot subscription for contact and deal management.

title: Define safe lifecycle hook execution policy
description: Repository review found lifecycle hooks executed through shell entry points in local, Modal, and Cloudflare workers. Decide whether hooks are intentionally trusted shell snippets or should be parsed/represented as argv arrays, then apply the policy consistently across backends and docs.
acceptance_criteria: Hook execution policy is documented; local, Modal, and Cloudflare backends follow the same policy; security guidance no longer conflicts with implementation.

title: Handle validation infrastructure failures explicitly
description: Repository review found validation can still strand tasks if review/PR setup infrastructure fails after a run completes. Add a clear retry, stuck, or human-escalation path for review API errors, branch push failures, and PR creation failures.
acceptance_criteria: Review API, branch push, and PR creation failures result in persisted task state changes and observable escalation or retry; regression tests cover at least one failure path.
close_reason: Validation infrastructure failures now persist retry or terminal state for review AI, branch push, and PR creation failures; regression tests cover retry and max-attempt paths.

title: Review repo and improve quality
description: Perform a repository-wide review, identify concrete quality issues, implement contained improvements, and validate with relevant checks.
acceptance_criteria: Relevant quality gates pass; implemented changes are scoped and documented; any follow-up work is tracked.
close_reason: Implemented review fixes: validation retry transition, prompt attempt numbering, reconciler recovery transition, dead-worker reconciliation failure handling, and bounded local output cursor. Local gates pass; Dockerized CI blocked by missing docker compose plugin.
